assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row added with serena_ui in the Serena Instance column.

Code Intelligence line 38: 'PRESERVED | Tool naming convention...', line 39: 'PRESERVED | Limitation for serena_backend...', line 40: 'ADDED | Limitation entry for serena_ui'.

Skipped.' changes-log.md lines 59-62: 'SKIPPED | User declined to enable security triage'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — file ends at line 50 after Bug Configuration.
